issues.title: Double tasks generated for Loan Simple leads in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were generating duplicate tasks across the pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The issue was traced to a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and resolved the underlying association/filter problem.
issues.workaround: Review affected LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks as needed.

issues.title: LO name not updating in automated emails after loan officer change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, the automated emails continued to display the previous loan officer's information rather than the updated one. The issue affected at least one deal where the LO was changed to Julie Yocum but emails still showed Paul. The fix was applied by Luis.
issues.workaround: For deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually verify that outgoing emails reflect the correct loan officer and resend if necessary.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Deals marked as Closed Lost or Transferred were continuing to generate post-referral workflow check-in tasks instead of stopping enrollment. The issue affected at least one deal marked Closed Lost on 2/26 that still received tasks on 3/2. Madelaine made a tweak to the workflow filters on 3/9 to resolve it.
issues.workaround: For deals marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window that received erroneous tasks, manually unenroll them from the post-referral workflow and dismiss any incorrectly generated tasks.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage reverted and reset to Offer Accepted
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, reverted to a prior stage (e.g., Committed or Referred Active), and then set back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that 'deal stage = offer accepted' was missing from the re-enrollment criteria. Madelaine added it as a re-enrollment trigger on 3/16.
issues.workaround: For deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks, manually enroll them in the Offer Accepted workflow to generate the required closing info tasks.

issues.title: TC workflow not triggering for MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not enrolling into the TC workflow, resulting in TCs not receiving tasks. HubSpot support was contacted and identified the underlying issue. The fix was confirmed by Madelaine on 4/1 after speaking with HubSpot support.
issues.workaround: For MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window that did not trigger TC tasks, manually enroll them in the TC workflow and send any required closing info emails manually.
